Forgiveness of Technical Clause...
(Dr. Vinod Mahadevrao Mohitkar)
Government of Maharashtra
Department of Higher and Technical Education
Government Decision No. Narrow 2025 / Q. No. 89/25 Tanshi-1
4th Floor, Mantralaya (Extension), Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
Madame Cama Marg, Mumbai 400032
Dated March 12, 2026
Reference:
1) Government Decision, Higher and Technical Education Department No. SCT 6598 / (53/98) / Tanshi-4,
Dated January 29, 2000.
2) Government Decision, Higher and Technical Education Department No. SCT-6507 / (133/07) / Tanshi-4,
3) Government Decision, Higher and Technical Education Department No. SCT-6507 / (133/07 Tanshi-1,
4) Government Decision, Higher and Technical Education Department No. SCT-6511 / (222/11) /

5) Government Decision, Higher and Technical Education Department No. SASENI-2017 / Q. 262/17 TANSHI-1,
Dated 24th November, 2017.
6) Government Decision, Higher and Technical Education Department No. SASENI-2023 / Q. 106/23 TANSHI-1,
Dated July 31, 2023.
The Proposal: -
Reference No. Dr. Vinod Mahadevrao as a candidate sponsored by Maharashtra Public Service Commission under Section 1.
Mohitkar was nominated to the post of Assistant Director (Technical).
Accordingly, Dr. Mohitkar had joined the post on the date 24.02.2000. After that,
Reference No. 2 Temporary promotion of Dr. Mohitkar to the post of Deputy Director, Technical Education
was given. Also, Dr. Mohitkar was given the post of Deputy Director (Technical Education).
The provisional promotion is subject to approval of the General Administration Department vide Reference No. 3 and 4 from time to time 11
months or before the approval of the Maharashtra Public Service Commission, whichever is earlier.
The deadline has been extended.
Government Decision No: Narrow 2025 / Q. No. 89/25 Tanshi-1
Thereafter, on the recommendation of the Maharashtra Public Service Commission, Reference No. 5 under Dr. Vinod
Mohitkar as Joint Director, Technical Education / Director, Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education
has been appointed by nomination. Accordingly, Dr. Mohitkar dated 28.11.2017
(M.P.) has assumed the office.
Thereafter, a reference was made to Dr. Vinod Mohitkar on the recommendation of the Maharashtra Public Service Commission.
Director, Technical Education, Directorate of Technical Education, State of Maharashtra under No.6
has been appointed by nomination. Accordingly, Dr. Mohitkar dated 01.08.2023
He joined the post on (M.P.). Dr. Mohitkar, dated 30.06.2026
Retiring on schedule. Providing retirement benefits to Dr. Mohitkar
To do so, refer to No. 2 Deputy Director, Technical Education.
Technical Clause in Temporary Promotion Rules, 1981 of the Maharashtra Civil Services (Pension) Rules, 1981
The issue of pardon under 48 (1) was under the consideration of the government.
The government's decision:
As per Rule 48 (1) of the Maharashtra Civil Services (Pension) Rules, 1982, Dr. Vinod
Mohitkar has been given a temporary promotion to the post of Deputy Director, Technical Education.
The technical clause pardoning is being approved as follows:
2. The said Government Decision is being issued with the approval of the competent authorities.
